instruction: Review your applicable screenings list and complete all that are overdue (next_due date has passed). For each overdue screening: 1) Check if a referral is needed (specialist screenings require referrals), 2) Verify pre-authorization is in place if required, 3) Schedule pre-screening labs if the screening requires them, 4) Schedule the screening appointment. Group same-provider visits on the same day when possible to minimize visits. Do not schedule screenings that are not yet due.
